name: Historic Museum
description: Explore the rich history of Timbuktu at the Historic Museum, featuring artifacts and exhibits from ancient times.

name: Central Park
description: Enjoy a day out in the sun at Central Park, a beautiful green space in the heart of the city.

name: Art Gallery
description: Discover contemporary art from local and international artists at the Art Gallery.

name: City Library
description: A haven for book lovers, the City Library offers a vast collection of books and resources.

name: Botanical Gardens
description: Stroll through the Botanical Gardens and enjoy the diverse plant life and serene environment.

name: Science Center
description: Engage with interactive exhibits and learn about science and technology at the Science Center.

name: Aquarium
description: Experience the wonders of the ocean at the Aquarium, home to a variety of marine life.

name: Zoo
description: Visit the Zoo to see a wide range of animals from around the world in naturalistic habitats.
